top_signals.title: Beijing Unfazed by China Shock 2.0 as Premier Touts Openness
top_signals.summary: Beijing’s No. 2 official played down worries about the disruption wrought by his country’s surging exports on the global economy, instead championing the benefits provided to the world by China’s development.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Google’s online dominance is showing signs of cracking in AI era
top_signals.summary: While Google remains in a position of strength in the eyes of Wall Street, the AI era is complicating the company's story.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Asia tech stocks rebound after global rout; Samsung jumps 9%
top_signals.summary: Asia's technology stocks mostly rebounded on Wednesday amid choppy trading following a global selloff in the previous session.
